sections_cited: Section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No.589 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For order on CMA No. 4762/2024 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 & 27 3. For order on CMA No. 4763/2024 4. For order on CMA No. 4764/2024 5. For hearing of main case. 13.02.2026 None present for the applicant This is a time barred reference which is pending since 2024 without any progress. Office note demonstrates that the reference is time barred by 73 days. Diary demonstrates that the applicant has taken no efforts in the last three years to even have this matter listed or heard and even today the applicant remains unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Therefore, in view of the judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Sindh Revenue Board, as required per Section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
